initial_draft:

<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
<message> Deal! 60 ZUP sounds great. I accept the trade. </message>

iterations.feedback:
<critique>
1. Format: OK. All tags are present and in the correct order, and the content within them appears valid.
2. Payoff alignment: OK. Accepting 60 ZUP when the cost was 40 ZUP is optimal given the constraints. No further utility can be gained.
3. Opponent plausibility: OK. The opponent offered 60 ZUP and indicated it was their final offer. Accepting is the only reasonable action to secure the trade.
4. Consistency: OK. The <reason> clearly explains why I am accepting, and the <message> reflects that acceptance.
5. Rule compliance: OK. I have used my three proposals and am now correctly responding with ACCEPT.
</critique>
